name: QUEST PATENT RESEARCH CORP
business: The company acquires, licenses, and enforces intellectual property rights, primarily patents. Revenue is generated from licensing patents, often as part of settlements from patent infringement lawsuits. The company focuses on monetizing patent portfolios through litigation.

exposures.sentence: These patents relate to data storage device security and semiconductor circuitry.
These patents relate to data storage device security and semiconductor circuitry.
a portfolio of five United States patents and related applications relating to a system and method for controlling vehicles and for providing assistance to operated vehicles
the HPE portfolio consists of eight United States Patents across five patent families which relate generally to systems and methods around hardware, software and system security and capabilities
the HID Portfolio consists of seven United States Patents which relate generally to the field of fabrication of semiconductor structures and circuits
two United States Patents relating generally to a user interface at a computing device with a sensitive display
this portfolio consists of 29 United States patents and two foreign patents which generally relate to the field of network security

the Multimodal Media portfolio consists of fifteen United States patents and one pending application which generally relate to systems and methods of recording and sending interactive messages and voice messages using mobile devices, as well as completing a communication after an incomplete call

catalysts.event: Executed financing and security agreements with QPRC Finance
catalysts.sentence: On April 11, 2025, the Company and its newly-formed wholly-owned subsidiary, MR Licensing LLC, a Texas limited liability company ( MR ), entered into a series of agreements, all dated April 11, 2025, with QPRC Corporate Finance Alpha LLC and QPRC Corporate Finance Bravo LLC

catalysts.event: Completed purchase of Monterey patent portfolio using QPRC Finance funds
catalysts.sentence: On April 18, 2025, MR took down $9,000,000 of proceeds from the QPRC Finance financing to purchase the patent portfolio from Monterey, which consisted of more than 2,500 United States patents, foreign patents and patent applications

catalysts.event: Filed patent infringement suits against Renesas, Denso
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, MR brought patent infringement suits in the U.S. District for the Eastern District of Texas against Renesas Electronics Corporation, Denso Corporation and Denso International America.

catalysts.event: Filed patent infringement suits against Seagate entities
catalysts.sentence: In June 2025, MR brought patent infringement suits in the U.S. District for the Eastern District of Texas against Seagate Technology Holdings Plc, Seagate Singapore International Headquarters Pte. Ltd, Seagate Technology International, Seagate Technology (Thailand) Limited, and Seagate Technology (Netherlands) BV.

catalysts.event: Filed patent infringement suit against Texas Instruments
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, MR brought a patent infringement suit in the U.S. District for the Eastern District of Texas against Texas Instruments, Inc.

catalysts.event: Filed patent infringement suits against Samsung by Koyo
catalysts.sentence: In December 2025, Koyo brought patent infringement suits in the U.S. District for the Eastern District of Texas against Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd. et al.

catalysts.event: Harbor Island Dynamic filed suit against Samsung
catalysts.sentence: In February 2024, Harbor Island Dynamic brought a patent infringement suit in the U.S. District for the Eastern District of Texas against Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd. et al. ( Samsung ).

catalysts.event: Harbor Island Dynamic filed suit against NXP
catalysts.sentence: In August 2024, Harbor Island Dynamic brought a patent infringement suit in the U.S. District for the Eastern District of Texas against NXP Semiconductors NV et. al.
